items.title: Can Float Fuel Berkshire's Long-Term Growth and Value Creation?
items.description: Float's steady rise to $173B is powering BRK.B's long-term growth, despite EPS estimate cuts and a premium valuation.

items.title: Insurtech company COVU acquires Ford Insurance Agency
items.description: Ford Insurance Agency offers both commercial and personal insurance coverage in Maine, US.

items.title: 2025 Travelers Championship Generates More Than $4 Million for Charity
items.description: HARTFORD, Conn., June 23, 2025--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced that the 2025 Travelers Championship – a PGA TOUR Signature Event – generated more than $4 million for over 215 nonprofits, both record highs.
